# Decision Supersedes @doc(team.decision-supersedes)

Decision relations preserve replacement history.

::decision billing.legacy-refunds
status: accepted
decided_by: architecture
--
Use manual refund approval for every account adjustment.
::

::decision billing.refund-policy
status: accepted
decided_by: architecture
supersedes: billing.legacy-refunds
--
Use policy-based refund approval with ledger-backed audit entries.
::
